# Generated by tools/m10_fourth_century.py --write; AD 300-399 historical currents.
# Dates are emitted only from docs/timeline.csv through AntqDate.
namespace = antq_m10_fourth

# Armenian Conversion; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=ARM
antq_m10_fourth.4000 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_fourth.4000.title
	desc = antq_m10_fourth.4000.desc
	outcome = neutral
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_armenia_conversion.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAO
		from = 301.1.1
		to = 315.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_fourth.4000.a
		historical_option = yes
		# IRAN-ARMCONV: 301 is the plan's traditional-current anchor; chronology is contested.
		change_religion = religion:antq_early_christianity
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
	}
}

# Hunnic Arrival; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=SIB
antq_m10_fourth.4006 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_fourth.4006.title
	desc = antq_m10_fourth.4006.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_huns_arrive.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XDO
		from = 370.1.1
		to = 371.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_fourth.4006.a
		historical_option = yes
		# CAM-HUN;CAM-ATT; Kazan is the bounded Volga local-mesh entry proxy.
		location:kazan = {
			create_country_from_location = {
				define_unique_country_tag = HNS
				change_country_name = HNS
				change_country_adjective = HNS
				change_country_color = map_HNS
				change_country_flag = HNS
				change_culture = ROOT.culture
				change_religion = ROOT.religion
				change_government_type = government_type:steppe_horde
				add_reform = government_reform:antq_steppe_confederation
				change_heir_selection = heir_selection:tribal_oldest_male
			}
			add_core = c:HNS
		}
		c:XCF = {
			add_stability = stability_mild_penalty
			add_prestige = prestige_mild_penalty
		}
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
	}
}

		monthly_chance = 100

	option = {
		name = antq_m10_fourth.4011.a
		historical_option = yes
		destroy_international_organization = { target = international_organization:antq_panhellenic_games }
		add_legitimacy = legitimacy_mild_bonus
	}
}

# East-West Roman Division; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=ROM
antq_m10_fourth.4012 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_fourth.4012.title
	desc = antq_m10_fourth.4012.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_east_west_division.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAA
		from = 395.1.1
		to = 396.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_fourth.4012.a
		historical_option = yes
		# OUP-EW;CAM-DYNASTY; bounded regional envelope documented in docs/m10/.
		change_tag_cosmetic = { tag = WRE }
		location:constantinople = {
			create_country_from_location = {
				define_unique_country_tag = ERO
				change_country_name = ERO
				change_country_adjective = ERO
				change_country_color = map_ERO
				change_country_flag = ERO
				change_culture = ROOT.culture
				change_religion = ROOT.religion
				change_government_type = government_type:monarchy
				add_reform = government_reform:antq_dominate
				change_heir_selection = heir_selection:cognatic_primogeniture
			}
			add_core = c:ERO
		}
		every_owned_location = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					this = location:adranos
					this = location:ajdabiya
					this = location:akcasehir
					this = location:akhisar

					this = location:tavas
					this = location:tavsanli
					this = location:terme
					this = location:tetovo
					this = location:thasos
					this = location:thebes
					this = location:thessaloniki
					this = location:tidah
					this = location:tinnis
					this = location:tirana
					this = location:tire
					this = location:tmimi
					this = location:tobruk
					this = location:tosya
					this = location:trebizond
					this = location:trgoviste_SER
					this = location:trikala
					this = location:tripolitsa
					this = location:tryavna
					this = location:tsaribrod
					this = location:tulcea
					this = location:turgut
					this = location:tutrakan
					this = location:tyrnavos
					this = location:uluborlu
					this = location:ulus
					this = location:unye
					this = location:urla
					this = location:usak
					this = location:ushmum_tannah
					this = location:uskudar
					this = location:uzice
					this = location:valjevo
					this = location:varna
					this = location:velbuzd
					this = location:veles
					this = location:veligosti
					this = location:veliki_preslav
					this = location:veria
					this = location:viannos
					this = location:vidin
					this = location:visegrad
					this = location:visesav
					this = location:vonitsa
					this = location:vostitsa
					this = location:vranje
					this = location:vratsa
					this = location:wadi_el_natrun
					this = location:warrada
					this = location:xylokastro
					this = location:yalvac
					this = location:yenicepazari
					this = location:yuksekkum
					this = location:zakynthos
					this = location:zemlungrad
					this = location:zetounion
					this = location:zica
				}
			}
			change_location_owner = c:ERO
			add_core = c:ERO
		}
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
	}
}

# Faxian and Gupta Apogee; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=HAN
antq_m10_fourth.4013 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_fourth.4013.title
	desc = antq_m10_fourth.4013.desc
	outcome = neutral
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_faxian_gupta.dds"
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_fourth.4013.a
		historical_option = yes
		add_stability = stability_weak_penalty
	}
}
